actors.name: road cur
actors.intent: harries in a snapping half-circle, bold only in numbers
actors.weakness: cowardly once the boldest one falls
actors.counter: fire, a thrown ration to scatter them, or breaking the pack's nerve
actors.want: food and a warm place out of the wind

actors.name: carrion thing
actors.intent: feeds on the fallen and grows bolder near the dead
actors.weakness: hates bright light and open flame
actors.counter: keeping clear of corpses, burning it, or drawing it into daylight
actors.want: to be left alone with what it has claimed
